defaultSeo.title: Lukasz Komur - Software Engineer, Senior Backend Engineer, Solution Architect
defaultSeo.description: Lukasz Komur is a software engineer, senior backend engineer and solution architect focused on backend systems, integrations, cloud architecture, internal platforms, automation and production-ready software delivery.

longTail: senior backend engineer for technical project
architect for cloud and serverless systems

senior developer for integrations and automation
software engineer for short technical missions
experienced engineer for project rescue and architecture cleanup
